news.title: US investors rethink bonds' role as inflation reshapes portfolios
news.description: US investors are reducing bond allocations and increasing inflation-sensitive assets.  This shift aims to diversify portfolios against market volatility and rising prices. news.title: Global Market: ECB signals future debate on raising bank reserve requirements to reduce central bank losses
news.description: The European Central Bank may increase minimum reserve requirements for commercial banks. This move could reduce interest payments made to lenders by the Eurosystem. news.title: OpenAI is trying to conquer the office. Legal is next.

news.title: From Defense to Housing, Luxembourg Steps Up Retail Bonds Push
news.description: Luxembourg’s successful sale of defense bonds has encouraged it to again turn to retail investors, this time with securities that will help fund affordable housing.

news.title: Silver imports slump as new licensing disrupts shipments
news.description: In May, the country imposed silver import licensing requirements to preserve foreign-exchange reserves, causing shipments to drop from 747 tons in January to an estimated 29 tons in June, according to Metals Focus

news.title: India Silver Imports Slump as New Licensing Disrupts Shipments
news.description: Silver imports into India have slowed sharply as a new licensing regime disrupted shipments, pushing local premiums to a multi-month high.
